summary: Iteration 5: Comprehensive testing of المؤذن العالمي (The Global Muezzin) v2.0 admin dashboard features. Backend: 12/12 new admin API tests passed (health, auth, ads CRUD, pages CRUD, scheduled notifications CRUD, settings). Frontend: Admin dashboard verified with all 6 tabs (overview, users, ads, notifications, pages, settings), login flow working, PWA manifest correctly branded as 'المؤذن العالمي', no old brand 'تأكد' found, dark mode enabled, service worker accessible.

minor.issue: 403 error in console (non-critical, app still functions)

critical_code_review_comments: Admin dashboard correctly shows 6 tabs: overview, users, ads, notifications, pages, settings
Ads management shows all 11 supported platforms: Google AdSense, AdMob, ExoClick, PopAds, Clickadu, HilltopAds, Monetag, Adsterra, ySense, YouTube, Custom
PWA manifest.json correctly branded as 'المؤذن العالمي' (not 'تأكد')
Service worker sw-custom.js accessible and handles prayer notifications
No password_hash exposed in admin stats/users endpoints (security verified)
All admin CRUD operations working: create/delete ads, pages, scheduled notifications

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load, login works, admin 6 tabs verified)

seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed ads, pages, notifications created and cleaned up during pytest
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend admin APIs tested and working. Frontend admin dashboard has 6 tabs fully functional. PWA correctly branded. Service worker active. Login flow working. No old brand references. AI features using Gemini 2.0. Dark mode enabled by default.

backend_apis.ads_active: ✅ GET /api/ads/active - public endpoint returns active ads

frontend_pages.home: ✅ Dark mode, brand 'المؤذن العالمي', no 'تأكد' reference, daily hadith
frontend_pages.auth: ✅ Login/register forms, Google login button, correct branding
frontend_pages.admin_ads: ✅ Ads management with 11 supported platforms displayed
frontend_pages.admin_settings: ✅ Maintenance mode toggle, announcement field, app info
